name: network_self_link
description: The URI of the VPC being created

name: subnets_private_access
description: Whether the subnets will have access to Google API's without a public IP

name: network_id
description: The ID of the VPC being created

name: subnets_names
description: The names of the subnets being created

name: subnets_ids
description: The IDs of the subnets being created

name: subnets_regions
description: The region where the subnets will be created

name: subnets_flow_logs
description: Whether the subnets will have VPC flow logs enabled

name: route_names
description: The route names associated with this VPC

name: subnets
description: A map with keys of form subnet_region/subnet_name and values being the outputs of the google_compute_subnetwork resources used to create corresponding subnets.

name: subnets_by_region_purpose
description: A list of subnet summary objects containing id, purpose, and region extracted from the subnets map.

name: network_name
description: The name of the VPC being created

name: subnets_ips
description: The IPs and CIDRs of the subnets being created

name: subnets_self_links
description: The self-links of subnets being created

name: subnets_secondary_ranges
description: The secondary ranges associated with these subnets

name: subnets_overview
description: A high-level overview of the created subnets and their core addressing/routing attributes such as id, purpose,ip_cidr_range and region extracted from the subnets map.
